subcodes.first_line: O thou who callest upon God to shelter thee within His all-encompassing mercy! Know thou that the factions throughout the ages [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من یدعو الله ان یجیره فی جوار رحمته الکبری اعلم ان الاحزاب فی القرون
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @suffering and imprisonment, @degrees of faith; certitude, @Jabulqa and Jabarsa, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past
